title: Personalised Baby Blanket with Name Custom Newborn Blanket Keepsake Soft Fleece 75 x 100cm Embroidered Baby Wrap Embossed Baby Girl Boy Blankets 4 Colours (Pink)
features: Personalised with Baby’s Name – Each blanket is custom embroidered with up to 20 characters in elegant silver-grey thread, making it truly unique. Add your baby’s name for a personal touch and create a keepsake gift today.
Available in 4 Classic Colours – Choose from Pink, Blue, Grey or White, making it suitable for both baby boys and girls. A stylish and versatile addition to any nursery or pram set.

Ideal Size & Everyday Use – Measuring 75cm x 100cm, this soft fleece blanket is the perfect size for prams, cots, car seats, or cosy snuggles at home. Lightweight yet warm, designed for daily use with newborns, infants and toddlers.
Luxury Embossed Texture – Crafted from super-soft fleece with a textured embossed pattern, this blanket combines comfort with style. Gentle against delicate skin while adding a premium look and feel.

Perfect Baby Gift for Any Occasion – A personalised baby blanket with name makes a thoughtful and timeless present for newborns, baby showers, christenings, first birthdays or Christmas gifts. A keepsake parents will treasure forever.
description: Product Description Personalised Baby Blanket with Name – A Gift They’ll Treasure Forever Custom Comfort for your Baby Our personalised baby blankets are embroidered in elegant silver-grey thread, creating a timeless keepsake for your little one. Soft & Gentle for Newborns Made from soft, high-quality fleece, this newborn blanket is perfect for sensitive skin. Perfect Baby Gift Idea Add a gift box and note for a thoughtful presentation that new parents will love. Choose from 4 Gorgeous Colours Our luxury baby blankets features a charming embossed finish that looks beautiful in the nursery or when out and about. Soft, Personalised Comfort for Newborns and Toddlers We create timeless personalised keepsakes for little ones. Each blanket is embroidered with care, making every piece unique and special Baby Blanket - Personalised Perfect Size Measuring 75x100cm, this blanket is beautifully sized for daily use or display. Use it as a baby pram blanket , car seat blanket , or just for snuggles and tummy time at home. Custom Embroidered with Baby’s Name Make it truly personal with elegant silver-grey embroidery, stitched directly onto the blanket. You can add up to 20 characters. How do I personalise the blanket with my baby’s name? Simply enter your baby’s name (up to 20 characters) in the personalisation box at checkout. We’ll custom embroider it in elegant silver-grey thread on the corner of the blanket. What size is the blanket? The blanket measures 75x100cm – perfect for use in prams, car seats, cots, or for tummy time and snuggles. Is the blanket safe for newborns? Yes, it’s made from ultra-soft, baby-safe plush fabric that’s gentle on delicate skin and ideal from birth onwards. Is the blanket machine washable? Absolutely. The blanket is machine washable on a gentle cycle. Custom Embroidered Blanket – The Gift Every Parent Loves Looking for something special? Whether it’s to celebrate a newborn arrival, Christmas, baby showers, christenings, birthdays , this personalised baby blanket with name makes a thoughtful gift. A perfect mix of practicality and sentiment, it’s a present that will be treasured by parents .
